Title: Pocket Floral Print T-Shirt for Men and Women - Orange Crewneck Tee
Description:
Celebrate your style with this vibrant orange T-shirt, featuring a delicate floral print patch pocket.

Crafted from soft, comfortable material, this tee is designed for all-day wear and versatility. The bright, cheerful orange color makes it perfect for warm weather or adding a pop of color to your wardrobe.

  • Comfortable Fit: The classic crewneck design provides a universally flattering and comfortable fit.
  • Unique Detail: The small, charming floral pocket print adds a subtle yet sophisticated artistic touch.
  • Material Feel: Made from high-quality, breathable fabric that feels soft against the skin.

This T-shirt is ideal for casual outings, weekend gatherings, or everyday relaxed wear. It makes a wonderful gift for a friend or family member who appreciates unique, comfortable apparel.

Care Instructions: Machine wash cold with like colors for best results. Tumble dry low.
